## Reviewer verification (required before approval)

- [ ] At least one reviewer has verified visual behavior in the affected flow(s).

## UI quality checklist

- [ ] Design tokens are used consistently and no unnecessary new tokens were added.
- [ ] Spacing is consistent with existing layout patterns.
- [ ] Interactive controls have clear and visible focus states.
- [ ] Mobile responsiveness was verified for affected views.

## Metadata

- [ ] UI-heavy PR: add the `ui-change` label to trigger visual QA attention.
- [ ] If recurring UI issues were found, add/update entries in `docs/design-debt-backlog.md`.
